creator_specialty: Sustainable fashion and conscious lifestyle content
focus_area: Elevating affordable, eco-conscious wardrobe choices for Gen Z and young millennial audiences
audience_demographics: Highly mobile-first consumption; story and Reels heavy
Values: climate action, ethical labor, transparent supply chains

social_metrics.name: Average Engagement Rate
social_metrics.reference_range: 3–5% typical for fashion creators at this scale

expertise_areas.description: Breaks down complex sustainability topics (materials, certifications, circular fashion) into practical, shoppable advice.
High-end editorial aesthetic with strong color grading and consistent art direction across grid, Stories, and Reels.
Uses weekly polls and question stickers to co-design capsule collections and gather product feedback.

proposed_deliverables.name: Sustainable Capsule Wardrobe Drop
proposed_deliverables.brand_objective: Drive consideration and waitlist sign-ups for a new eco-conscious basics line via styled lookbooks and behind-the-scenes content.

previous_collaborations: GreenThread Co. — capsule ‘30 wears’ challenge with shoppable Reels
BrightLoop Denim — upcycled denim drop launch with before/after styling content
EarthCart — climate-positive marketplace takeover with live Q&A on certifications
bio: Sofia is a bilingual sustainable fashion creator who turns complex supply-chain and materials conversations into aspirational, everyday outfit inspiration. Her audience trusts her to decode greenwashing, highlight genuinely better choices, and show how to build a long-lasting wardrobe on a realistic budget.
